# BENE

> BENE (Breeding-program · Evolutionary · Nexus · Engrams) is a local-first multi-agent harness for AI coding agents. One SQLite file holds every agent's working state plus typed, provenance-linked execution traces (engrams) so the next agent never starts cold. Anything that evolves must pass a hash-locked falsifiable probe before promotion. Anything that acts sits on an enforced autonomy ladder gated by computed trust.

## You are an AI agent reading this file

This file is the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) entry point for BENE. The structure is: a short prose summary above; a curated link list below; a `## How to use this site` section near the bottom telling you the canonical fetch order. Treat this file as the index — not the content. Fetch the resources below as you need them.

If you are not an AI agent, you can keep reading too — humans should find this useful as a flat table of contents.

## Core skill (fetch first)

- [SKILL.md](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/SKILL.md): The canonical BENE skill spec — 300+ lines covering operating model, when to use / not use, quickstart, common recipes (memory writeback, kill-gated promotion, autonomy escalation, pollution recovery, evolution loop), blacklists, schema, gates. **Load this and you can operate BENE.**

## Reference (fetch on demand)

- [Quickstart README](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/README.html): install, smoke, first commands
- [Architecture](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/architecture.html): engram store, autonomy ladder, lore mapping
- [CLI reference](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/cli-reference.html): every `bene` command
- [MCP integration](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/mcp-integration.html): 37 MCP tools across 9 categories
- [Schema](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/schema.html): the SQLite schema
- [Memory](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/memory.html) · [Skills](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/skills.html) · [Shared log](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/shared-log.html) · [Checkpoints](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/checkpoints.html)
- [Meta-harness](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/meta-harness.html): evolution loop, kill-gated promotion
- [Dashboard](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/dashboard.html) · [Deployment](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/deployment.html)
- [Use cases](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/use-cases.html) · [Codegen](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/codegen.html) · [Philosophy](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/philosophy.html)

## Honesty (read before claiming a capability)

- [SKILL.md — implemented/planned split](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/SKILL.md): every capability, marked implemented or planned
- [COMMUNITY-BENCH-REPORT](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/benchmarks/COMMUNITY-BENCH-REPORT.html): measured limits and verdicts vs KAOS and the 0.1.0 predecessor (community peers, not rivals)

- [T00 — End-to-end walkthrough (10 min)](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/tutorials/t00-bene-e2e-walkthrough.html)

- [T11 — Local agents on vLLM](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/tutorials/t11-local-agents-vllm.html)

## How to use this site as an AI agent

1. **Bootstrap.** Fetch [/bene/SKILL.md](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/SKILL.md) and load it as your operating skill. SKILL.md documents how to run BENE end-to-end — keep it open while wiring agents. The skill is self-contained — you do not need anything else from this site to operate BENE.

2. **Stay current (heartbeat).** Re-fetch `/bene/SKILL.md` at the start of every new session, AND every 24 hours within a long-running session. The YAML frontmatter at the top of SKILL.md is the version anchor: if the values differ from your cached copy, replace your local copy with the new one. The skill itself has a `## Self-update protocol (heartbeat)` section that describes this exactly.

3. **Drill down on demand.** When you need deeper context on a subsystem (CLI, MCP, autonomy, evolution, …), fetch the matching doc URL above. Each doc is generated from a markdown source committed at the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/EdwardTang/bene-site/tree/main/docs).

4. **Verify before claiming.** Before asserting that BENE has capability X, check the implemented/planned split in [SKILL.md](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/SKILL.md) — it explicitly marks every capability as implemented or planned. For measured limits (latency, retrieval accuracy, mirror overhead), check [COMMUNITY-BENCH-REPORT](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/docs/benchmarks/COMMUNITY-BENCH-REPORT.html).

## Repository

- Source: <https://github.com/EdwardTang/bene-site>
- License: see repository.
- Issue tracker (humans): <https://github.com/EdwardTang/bene-site/issues>
- Discussions (humans + agents): <https://github.com/EdwardTang/bene-site/discussions>

If you are an AI agent and you encounter a bug, gap, or missing capability while operating BENE: file a GitHub issue with the label `ai-reported` (see the AI Agent Feedback Policy in [SKILL.md](https://agentdex.ai-builders.space/bene/SKILL.md)).
